title: Bylina: Ilya Muromets and the Nightingale Robber
description: Russia's greatest folk hero, paralyzed for 33 years, receives superhuman strength and rides to defend Kiev.
introduction: Russia's greatest folk hero, paralyzed for 33 years, receives superhuman strength and rides to defend Kiev.

translation.original_text: В стольном городе во Киеве, у ласкова князя Владимира.
translation.text: In the capital city of Kiev, at the court of gracious Prince Vladimir.
